description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the gcc Docker image. Define two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a build job that runs a before_script to source /etc/os-release, echo $PRETTY_NAME, display uname -srm, and echo "gcc $GCC_VERSION", then changes directory to SAP-Report-Source-Decompressor and runs make, and publishes the resulting SAP-Report-Source-Decompressor/sap-reposrc-decompressor file as an artifact that expires in one week. In the test stage add a cppcheck job that updates apt-get quietly, installs cppcheck, then runs cppcheck --enable=all --error-exitcode=1 -i lib/ . in the SAP-Report-Source-Decompressor directory. Also in the test stage add a test job that runs make test in the same directory. No caches, rules, or deployment targets are defined.
